selections.name: Rhetoric
selections.reason: Classy trials in NSW, looks ready to fire first-up for new stable.

selections.name: Lucky Man
selections.reason: Consistent performer who draws well and has placed fresh previously.

selections.name: Sweet Armani
selections.reason: Race fit after a solid 4th here last start, can figure in the finish.

selections.name: Icicle
selections.reason: Draws the inside barrier which is a huge advantage at this tight track.

danger_horse.name: Shalaa Strike
danger_horse.reason: Debutant with okay trial form, could surprise if she gets luck from the wide draw.

selections.name: Tuesday
selections.reason: Drawn perfectly in barrier 1, comes off a strong 2nd at Kilcoy and has early speed.

selections.name: He Da Boss
selections.reason: Finished a close 4th here last start, maps well from the draw.

selections.name: Xtravagant Gift
selections.reason: Solid 2nd at Grafton last start, wide draw is the only concern.

selections.name: Beans Means
selections.reason: Resuming but has shown ability in the past, can run a race fresh.

danger_horse.name: Lukey Blue
danger_horse.reason: Drawn well and should strip fitter second-up.

selections.name: Luke Skywalker
selections.reason: Strong 4th at Eagle Farm last start, looks well placed in this maiden.

selections.name: Too Darn Smart
selections.reason: Solid 3rd here last start, strips fitter and should be right in the finish.

selections.name: Boomtown Laddie
selections.reason: Drawn perfectly, can improve off his first-up run.

selections.name: Encrypted Feeling
selections.reason: Has tactical speed, just needs to overcome the wide gate.

danger_horse.name: Our Combination
danger_horse.reason: Drawn well and can improve on her debut effort.

selections.name: Dragon Song
selections.reason: Drawn perfectly, strong 4th at Ipswich last start, looks ready to win.

selections.name: Artifactx
selections.reason: Consistent form, 3rd at Ipswich last time out, major player despite the draw.

selections.name: Steel Impact
selections.reason: Gets the inside run, should be much fitter third-up.

selections.name: Decimus
selections.reason: Good 3rd here last start, wide draw makes it tricky but has the ability.

danger_horse.name: Oakfield Eagle
danger_horse.reason: Won well at Nanango last start, can measure up in this grade.

selections.name: Wanted Hillbilly
selections.reason: Drawn the pole and comes off a strong win at Toowoomba, the one to beat.

selections.name: Spirit Of Barty
selections.reason: Classy filly, 3rd at Eagle Farm last start, strong danger.

selections.name: Jeans
selections.reason: Drawn well, can bounce back from a slightly disappointing run last time.

selections.name: Embolden
selections.reason: Gets a soft run from barrier 2, can sneak into the placings.

danger_horse.name: Tinkerbella
danger_horse.reason: Fitter third-up, can improve off her recent runs.

selections.name: Charmed Passage (NZ)
selections.reason: Narrowly beaten here last start, gets a great run from barrier 4.

selections.name: Spirit Of Brodie
selections.reason: Drawn perfectly, solid 3rd at Gold Coast last time out.

selections.name: He's For The Girls
selections.reason: Consistent gelding, 3rd at Ipswich last start, right in this.

selections.name: Electric Arrow
selections.reason: Gets the inside draw, should be peaking third-up.

danger_horse.name: Uluwatu
danger_horse.reason: Drawn well, can improve on her first-up effort.

selections.name: Funhouse
selections.reason: Broke through for a nice win at Sunshine Coast last start, can go on with it.

selections.name: Crown Guinea
selections.reason: Drawn well, solid 4th at Sunshine Coast last time out.

selections.name: Zanjeer
selections.reason: Third-up and ready to peak, can improve off his recent runs.

selections.name: Charlotte's Here
selections.reason: Fair 5th here last start, maps to get a good run.

danger_horse.name: Faithinher
danger_horse.reason: Drawn well, can show up on her best form.
